2026 All-Russian Olympiad3
All-Russian Olympiad 2026
Grade 9
9.1	Initially, there are 75 candies on a plate.

Tintarn
view topic
9.2	Call a natural number $n$ strange if there exist pairwise distinct natural numbers $a,b,c,d,e>1$ such that
\[
n = a^{a^a} = b^{b^c} = d^{e^e}.
\]
Are there finitely or infinitely many strange numbers?

Tintarn
view topic
Grade 10
10.1	Same as 9.1
10.2	A sequence of natural numbers $a_1,a_2,\dots$ satisfies
\[
a_1+a_2+\dots+a_{2n-1}=a_n^2.
\]
Find all such sequences.

Tintarn
view topic
10.3	Third grade-ten problem.

Grade 11
11.1	Same as 10.1
11.2	The medians of an acute triangle $ABC$ meet at $M$.

11.3	Same as 9.4
